# Thread Lens Reference (Secondary)

This folder contains minimal copied references from Thread Lens fixtures used as
secondary support for Codex plan-shape discussion.

These files are **not** canonical proof for Conduit A-gates. Canonical proof is
owned by Conduit captures listed in `../run-manifest.json`.

Source provenance:

- `thread-lens/rust/testdata/providers/codex/trace-plan-mode.jsonl`
- `thread-lens/rust/testdata/providers/codex/protocol/request-user-input-live-probe.json`
